A Photo Series

Thames at Dawn

Shot on Apple iPhone 17 Pro · DNG Raw
London, England

Six frames taken along the Thames in the early morning hours, tracing the river from Blackfriars to Tower Bridge as the city wakes. The light moves from deep amber through pale haze, London's skyline held in perpetual silhouette against a sky that cannot quite decide between night and day.

001
#001

Thames at Sunrise — Golden Hour

A richly exposed panoramic view of the Thames at sunrise. Tower Bridge is silhouetted against a blazing golden sky on the right, with the towers of Canary Wharf rising behind it. Blackfriars Bridge spans the river in the foreground while the sun — a perfect molten disc — pours light across the water in long, shimmering ribbons. Construction cranes on the right catch the last warmth of the horizon.

File  IMG_2453.DNG

002
#002

Canary Wharf Skyline Close-Up

A tight telephoto composition of the Canary Wharf financial district, the iconic pyramid tip of One Canada Square catching the last light of the day. The towers dissolve into a warm amber haze, layered like stage flats. A railway bridge in the foreground grounds the skyline above the Thames.

File  IMG_2454.DNG

003
#003

Canary Wharf — Wider Frame

A slightly wider rendition of the Canary Wharf skyline, pulling back to reveal more of the city's western cluster and construction cranes on the left edge. A lone bird drifts above the treeline of towers. The golden atmospheric haze gives the whole scene the quality of a Turner oil painting.

File  IMG_2455.DNG

004
#004

Tower Bridge Through the Haze

Tower Bridge looms in pale sage morning mist, framed by the steel lattice of a railway bridge in the foreground. The City of London recedes into the fog behind it. HMS Belfast is visible moored between the two bridges. The pale, almost monochromatic palette gives the scene an ethereal, timeless quality.

File  IMG_2494.DNG

005
#005

Southwark Bridge — Brooding Sun

A stark, near-silhouette view from a western vantage looking east along the Thames. The sun hangs high and hazy in the upper-right corner, its disc diffused through morning smog. Southwark Bridge arches across the foreground, with Tower Bridge a spectral outline beyond. A small river taxi cuts through the dark water below.

File  IMG_2495.DNG

006
#006

Thames Barge — Morning Passage

Nearly identical in vantage to the previous frame, this shot captures a flat-hulled barge making its way westward along the Thames. The brooding sun and Tower Bridge silhouette remain, but the barge in the foreground adds a sense of movement and scale, emphasising London's enduring life as a working river.

File  IMG_2496.DNG

Thames at Dawn — Six Photographs London  ·  2025
